title: astragalus propinquus
intro: Astragalus propinquus, also known as Huang Qi, is a type of plant native to China and Mongolia, belonging to the legume family. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits of Astragalus propinquus include improving immune function, reducing fatigue, and enhancing overall well-being, making it a popular herb for preventing illness and promoting recovery. Astragalus propinquus can be prepared in various herbal forms, including dried root, capsules, tea, and tincture, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
